description: minimal v1.2 private-scope delegation — single recipient (the agent). Exercises the round-trip: principal seals canonical scope list with OC Lock to the agent's device key; agent decrypts; verifier reconstructs canonical message from decrypted scopes; standard SPEC §8.1 verification passes.
harness_assertion: (1) Build the envelope by sealing scopes_plaintext to the listed recipients; the resulting OC Agent envelope has scopes_encrypted but NO scopes field. (2) Verify with decryptScopesWith = recipients[0].{device_id, device_secret}. (3) Result MUST be ok: true; the returned envelope's `scopes` field MUST equal expected.decrypted_scopes (canonicalized form).
spec_reference: PRIVATE-SCOPE.md §1.1 (envelope schema), §2 (verifier algorithm steps P1–P6 + standard §8.1)
